package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
)

// scenario for ecb_mode_cipher: direct use of `cipher.Block.Encrypt` / `cipher.Block.Decrypt` without a block mode wrapper (CBC, CTR, GCM)
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario707Negative(key []byte) (cipher.AEAD, error) {
	block, err := aes.NewCipher(key)
	if err != nil { return nil, err }
	return cipher.NewGCM(block)
}
